requirement: Every in-vessel sensor LCC conductor joint insulation retention and ceramic part shall support continuous UHV operation at 250 deg C
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 material screen and Stage 40 source recheck; exact bonded stack and several purchased details remain unqualified
required_closure: Close the complete-stack continuous-life thermal-vacuum qualification before release

requirement: Ambient readout electronics remain outside vacuum
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 places three amplifier boards current sources logic and DAQ outside the vacuum boundary
required_closure: Preserve the vacuum boundary in final drawings

requirement: Provide three mutually orthogonal Hall sensors
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 has three orthogonal carrier faces; physical die-axis orientation remains a microscope gate
required_closure: Record die axes and install each LCC against the keyed X Y Z face traveler

requirement: The three Hall sensors shall be electrically isolated from one another
accepted_evidence: Netlist R2 and R3 connect each sensor input to board GND1 through 2.2 kohm; shared scope or star ground creates an inter-axis path
required_closure: Use independent isolated control and acquisition domains and verify isolation with all cables connected

requirement: Exactly twelve sensor conductors cross the feedthrough
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 assigns four unique V pins per axis and no shield pin
required_closure: Verify first-article continuity against the traveler

requirement: Installed head including clamps fasteners contacts and harness exits fits diameter 31.75 mm by height 27.5 mm
accepted_evidence: CAD bodies fit the numerical envelope but omit a connected nut-reaction cage and use an undersized harness corridor
required_closure: Regenerate corrected full-assembly CAD and rerun envelope collision and cable checks

requirement: Each bonded sensor plus LCC is independently removable reusable and protected during service
accepted_evidence: Concepts expose independent tool axes and service order but protection features and captured reaction hardware are incomplete
required_closure: Demonstrate one-axis service with adjacent instrumented bonds surviving the procedure

requirement: No adhesive shall retain reusable LCC modules in the head baseline
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 retention uses external fasteners and compliant metal elements; die attach is treated separately as a permanent microelectronic joint
required_closure: Keep module retention adhesive-free

requirement: After hard gates prioritize fabrication cost then LCC reuse then connection quality
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 uses the mandated weights but scores concepts while hard gates remain open
required_closure: Rescore only after all hard-gate corrections and vendor quotes

requirement: Recommended ceramic baseline has zero tapped or internal zirconia threads
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 thread schedule reports zero ceramic threads
required_closure: Maintain zero ceramic threads in released design

requirement: Prefer smooth through holes and externally accessible nonmagnetic fasteners
accepted_evidence: Concept drawings provide through holes and external axes but the preferred cage does not yet structurally capture every nut reaction
required_closure: Model and draw continuous load paths and captured replaceable nuts

requirement: Prefer identical flat ceramic parts
accepted_evidence: Concept A uses repeated flat carrier tiles as the provisional baseline
required_closure: Confirm machinability and tolerances with the zirconia vendor

requirement: No crossing or hidden bolts and all tools remain accessible
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 tool-axis drawings show noncrossing access; full corrected cage remains to be regenerated
required_closure: Demonstrate access with the corrected assembled geometry

requirement: Do not use unqualified PEEK in the hot reusable baseline
accepted_evidence: No PEEK appears in the Stage 30 baseline
required_closure: Reject substitutions unless separately qualified

requirement: Do not rely on unqualified BeCu stress relaxation
accepted_evidence: No BeCu appears in the Stage 30 baseline
required_closure: Reject substitutions unless separately qualified

requirement: Avoid magnetic nickel or steel near the sensors
accepted_evidence: Baseline proposes CP-Ti and zirconia locally but exact contact and feedthrough magnetic properties remain unresolved
required_closure: Measure magnetic moment and field perturbation for the complete installed stack

requirement: Avoid virtual leaks trapped volumes and blind nut traps
accepted_evidence: Vent intent exists but captive nut and screw-interface vent details are not fully defined
required_closure: Add continuous vent paths and verify by drawing review and vacuum test

requirement: No solder with inadequate continuous-temperature margin or flux residue in vacuum
accepted_evidence: Baseline excludes in-vessel solder
required_closure: Maintain no-solder hot-zone construction

requirement: No mechanical load path shall pass through electrical joints
accepted_evidence: Intent is explicit but the preferred fastener reaction structure is incomplete and the fanout strain relief is schematic
required_closure: Prove continuous mechanical load paths bypass bonds pads and contacts

requirement: Resolve the pad-14 versus pad-18 routing inconsistency
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 distinguishes inner pad 14 with route 18 to 14; Stage 40 independently verified the notation
required_closure: Keep both physical pad and route identifiers in every traveler

requirement: Do not guess p1 through p4 die orientation
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 maintains an orientation-parametric map and microscope sign-off gate
required_closure: Do not release a fixed q-to-pad assignment before microscope evidence

requirement: Use proposed inner pads 8 3 19 and 14
accepted_evidence: Conditional q map uses these four inner pads
required_closure: Confirm die p orientation and bondability under microscope

requirement: Route 8 to 4 and 3 to 9
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 route table and drawings agree
required_closure: Continuity-check the manufactured LCC

requirement: Route 19 to 13 and route 18 to inner pad 14
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 route table and drawings agree and preserve 18 as route identifier
required_closure: Continuity-check the manufactured LCC

requirement: Avoid crossed and overlong bond wires
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 proposes a noncrossing map but actual die orientation and loop geometry are not measured
required_closure: Microscope-measure pad coordinates and qualify loop sweep and clearance

requirement: Protect bond wires against sweep and service damage
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 includes cover and service intent but no qualified clearance or instrumented service demonstration
required_closure: Perform thermal and handling sweep tests in the corrected cage

requirement: Address Al-Au intermetallic aging for continuous 250 deg C life
accepted_evidence: Literature and vendor claims show risk or limited-duration evidence; exact stack is not qualified
required_closure: Run same-stack thermal-vacuum aging with pull resistance cross-section and drift endpoints

requirement: Qualify adhesive die attach for the exact sensor LCC stack
accepted_evidence: 353ND data and general UHV use do not establish exact continuous-life stack performance
required_closure: Complete same-lot bonded-coupon qualification

requirement: Use nineteen unique feedthrough signal pins without shortage
accepted_evidence: Twelve signals plus seven spares occupy V1 through V19 exactly once
required_closure: Preserve the pin traveler

requirement: Provide seven spare signal pins
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 assigns V13 through V19 as spares
required_closure: Do not repurpose without revising the controlled map

requirement: Cable screens shall not consume signal pins
accepted_evidence: All six screens terminate to shells or chassis as specified
required_closure: Verify screen continuity and insulation during assembly

requirement: Distinguish vacuum-view and air-view mirror orientation
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 has V and A maps and an involutive mirror permutation
required_closure: Retain dual-view drawings at the assembly station

requirement: Do not rely solely on uncertain vendor mirror wording
accepted_evidence: Vendor drawing pattern is usable but caution sentence misnames 9C on a 19C drawing
required_closure: Obtain vendor clarification or record first-article V-to-A continuity

requirement: Use a 19-contact feedthrough compatible with the selected map
accepted_evidence: 110240 and 19C-275 support 19-contact geometry; exact ordered configuration remains gated
required_closure: Freeze part number orientation gender materials and certifications before order

requirement: Do not treat 250 deg C catalog maximum as continuous-life qualification
accepted_evidence: Artifacts label the 250 deg C feedthrough statement as catalog evidence rather than life proof
required_closure: Obtain continuous-duty vendor statement or qualify the assembly

requirement: Use UHV high-temperature conductors for all twelve sensor paths
accepted_evidence: KAP301 is vendor-rated UHV and 300 deg C but the selected two-pair bundle does not fit the modeled corridor
required_closure: Select a smaller qualified cable or enlarge corridor and rerun geometry

requirement: Account for cable capacitance in bandwidth and settling
accepted_evidence: Vendor capacitance values were recovered but are not included in a closed-loop acquisition budget
required_closure: Calculate worst-case settling with installed lengths and verify by measurement

requirement: Provide strain relief independent of electrical terminations
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 and 30 show intent but exact hot-zone clamp and fanout process are schematic
required_closure: Qualify clamp load transfer and terminal process

requirement: Avoid excessive conductor magnetic perturbation near the sensor
accepted_evidence: Twisted screened-pair concept reduces loop area but complete-current field impact is not measured
required_closure: Measure installed-head magnetic moment and driven-current field

requirement: Use three parallel per-axis readout paths
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 shows three repeated mux and instrumentation-amplifier chains
required_closure: Maintain channel identity through DAQ

requirement: Use one controlled excitation source per sensor axis
accepted_evidence: Current source is a block-level proposal without compliance noise drift and reversal qualification
required_closure: Design and validate all three current sources across hot-sensor resistance and cable bounds

requirement: Resolve the historical approximately 109-times current anomaly
accepted_evidence: Diagnostic procedure is proposed but no hardware measurement closes it
required_closure: Bench-test the existing board and record root cause before trusting sensor data

requirement: Prevent digital control fanout overload and power-sequence uncertainty
accepted_evidence: One SN74LVC125A output was proposed to drive all boards without proven loading and OE bias
required_closure: Provide one isolated control output per board and verify timing and power sequencing

requirement: Do not join isolated sensor domains through ambient board grounds
accepted_evidence: Existing netlist and common acquisition create a measurable DC return path
required_closure: Use galvanically isolated board supplies control and acquisition with an isolation test

requirement: Acquire the three axes simultaneously with bounded interchannel aperture skew
accepted_evidence: DSOX1204G has four channels but available evidence does not establish required galvanic isolation or aperture skew
required_closure: Select and qualify isolated simultaneous-sampling DAQ hardware

requirement: Define a valid phase-step sample rate
accepted_evidence: Eight samples per phase gives 5 kS/s at 40 Hz and 20 kS/s at 160 Hz; initial shorthand was ambiguous
required_closure: Freeze rate definitions and verify anti-alias and settling margins

requirement: Provide a safe EMI strategy without defeating galvanic isolation
accepted_evidence: Shield topology is documented but AGND_STAR and grounded BNC use defeat inter-axis isolation
required_closure: Use chassis-referenced shields with isolated signal domains and test common-mode paths

requirement: Separate verified schematic facts from proposed corrections
accepted_evidence: Stage 20 and red-team explicitly distinguish netlist evidence from proposed hardware
required_closure: Carry status labels into final release table

requirement: Develop at least three package concepts
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 contains concepts A B and C with CAD and drawings
required_closure: Use concepts as trade evidence only

requirement: Use hard safety and physics gates before weighted scoring
accepted_evidence: Scoring was computed before open hard gates were closed
required_closure: Correct and re-gate concepts before any down-select score is treated as decisive

requirement: Provide a continuous structural load path from each clamp screw to the base
accepted_evidence: Concept A nut pads are unconnected solids and concept B lacks a complete saddle cage
required_closure: Regenerate connected CP-Ti cage and verify contact and reaction interfaces

requirement: Capture replaceable nuts or nut plates without blind traps
accepted_evidence: Replaceable nut concept exists but its retention and venting are not defined
required_closure: Model captured vented accessible nuts and provide assembly section views

requirement: Use external accessible nonmagnetic fasteners
accepted_evidence: External M1.6 CP-Ti fasteners are proposed but exact parts and torque are not qualified
required_closure: Freeze sourced hardware and validate preload and reuse

requirement: Avoid reliance on electrical pads bonds or fanout for module retention
accepted_evidence: Retention intent bypasses the LCC but reaction structure and strain relief are incomplete
required_closure: Demonstrate structural independence under shock bake and service

requirement: Define preload with ceramic stress and thermal mismatch bounds
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 gives an illustrative preload window but no flexure geometry ceramic contact stress or life calculation
required_closure: Complete nonlinear contact and flexure-life analysis and validate on coupons

requirement: Prevent zirconia chipping at holes edges and clamp contacts
accepted_evidence: Edge breaks and compliant contacts are proposed without production dimensions or vendor process approval
required_closure: Add producible edge geometry surface finish and contact-stress limits

requirement: Account for thermal expansion across 250 deg C operation
accepted_evidence: First-order material expansion is discussed but full stack contact and flexure displacement are not solved
required_closure: Calculate hot and cold tolerance stack and verify preload retention

requirement: Prevent LCC rotation and preserve chamfer orientation
accepted_evidence: Keying and chamfer convention exist but actual fabricated key geometry and service validation are open
required_closure: Add physical anti-rotation features and keyed traveler checks

requirement: Ensure cable exits meet bend and clearance requirements
accepted_evidence: Modeled 3.00 mm corridor is smaller than two worst-case 1.65 mm cable diameters before clearance
required_closure: Freeze cable construction and rerun bend radius and corridor collision

requirement: Protect adjacent axes during independent module service
accepted_evidence: Guard-loop and tool-clearance concepts are not physically validated
required_closure: Perform a service trial with witness wires and record pass criteria

requirement: Define full manufacturing tolerances and GD&T before fabrication
accepted_evidence: Concept dimensions are bounded but production datums position profile and surface controls are incomplete
required_closure: Release controlled manufacturing drawings only after vendor DFM

requirement: No package may be released from collision-only CAD
accepted_evidence: STEP reimport and overlap checks passed but connectivity and flexible harness content were not represented
required_closure: Run a full assembly contact connectivity clearance and motion audit

requirement: Concept C axial clearance shall include a usable margin
accepted_evidence: Concept C has only about 0.10 mm modeled axial margin
required_closure: Increase margin or reject concept C

requirement: Use a real CAD kernel for STEP and STL inspection when available
accepted_evidence: CadQuery/OpenCascade generated solids and reimported STEP bounds
required_closure: Repeat after corrected geometry

requirement: Drawings tables and CAD shall agree on dimensions units axes and part identities
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 concept set is internally cross-referenced but known structural omissions prevent release
required_closure: Audit corrected production set against a single controlled parameter table

requirement: Unsupported prices shall not be presented as verified quotations
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 labels costs as ROM proposals
required_closure: Obtain comparable vendor quotes before procurement

requirement: Do not claim monolithic ceramic is cheaper without vendor evidence
accepted_evidence: Concept C is not selected on an unsupported low-cost claim
required_closure: Use vendor quotes in final procurement decision

requirement: Record replaceable and reusable part boundaries
accepted_evidence: Stage 30 parts and service tables identify module carrier cage and fastener roles
required_closure: Validate repeated removal and reinstall cycles

requirement: Separate verified fact calculation engineering proposal and unresolved gate
accepted_evidence: All stage outputs use explicit evidence classes and release labels
required_closure: Retain labels in synthesis

requirement: Label unsupported numerical limits ENGINEERING PROPOSAL - VALIDATE
accepted_evidence: Stage 10 through 30 use this label for proposed bounds
required_closure: Audit final tables for the label

requirement: Label unresolved fabrication or purchase details HOLD - DO NOT FABRICATE/ORDER
accepted_evidence: Stage outputs and red-team use hold language for open gates
required_closure: Maintain a release-blocker checklist

requirement: Use primary current sources and direct URLs for vendor or process claims
accepted_evidence: Source ledger includes manufacturer standards government and peer-reviewed sources; Stage 40 reopened critical sources
required_closure: Archive controlled copies or access dates for release

requirement: Do not infer continuous-life qualification from bake survival or catalog maximum
accepted_evidence: Red-team explicitly rejects this inference for feedthrough cable adhesive and bonds
required_closure: Require life evidence at the complete-stack level

requirement: Run an independent red-team after design stages and before synthesis
accepted_evidence: This Stage 40 audit was performed without editing Stage 10 20 or 30 artifacts
required_closure: Carry all blocker and major closures into Stage 50

requirement: Explicitly audit PEEK BeCu nickel steel solder flux virtual leaks trapped volumes hidden nuts and crossing bolts
accepted_evidence: Named-hazard table covers each item
required_closure: Retain unresolved hazards as open gates

requirement: Explicitly audit shared returns pin shortage and unsynchronized acquisition
accepted_evidence: Pin arithmetic passes; shared ground and DAQ architecture fail
required_closure: Correct isolation and demonstrate simultaneous acquisition

requirement: Explicitly audit 14 versus 18 mirror chamfer and die orientation
accepted_evidence: 14 versus 18 and mirror math pass; die orientation remains gated
required_closure: Complete microscope sign-off and first-article continuity

requirement: Every blocker and major finding shall have a correction and closure test
accepted_evidence: F40 table provides required correction and closure criterion for all BLOCKER and MAJOR rows
required_closure: Verify implementation evidence during synthesis

requirement: Do not fabricate or order while design-changing blockers remain
accepted_evidence: Eight blockers remain after independent review
required_closure: Keep final package at COMPLETE_WITH_OPEN_GATES and HOLD status

requirement: Final baseline must incorporate red-team corrections rather than silently accepting failed Stage 30 geometry
accepted_evidence: Stage 40 defines correction hierarchy; implementation is deferred to Stage 50
required_closure: Publish corrected synthesis architecture drawings ledgers and release checklist
